creator: lewis@retsim.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Kondratyev from comment #9)

This was all that was needed to get my Keycron Q6 working fine. All the function (media) keys work fine, and the volume knob. 

This appears to be a much better solution, at least for my keyboard, than applying the boot proto quirk. Which did also work for me, but meant my function keys did not work.
